description: Publish either the accepted planning handoff or the final accepted issue-resolution handoff after the required review gates pass, the issue-resolution documentation refresh runs when required, Step 9 emits the commit message, and Step 10 successfully commits and pushes.

output.description: Return either the accepted design-and-plan handoff or the final issue-resolution handoff, with review summaries, documentation refresh details, commit/push details, and residual risks.
